name: Life Orb
description: Holder's attacks do 1.3x damage, and it loses 1/10 its max HP after the attack.

name: Focus Sash
description: If holder's HP is full, it survives an attack that would KO it with 1 HP. Single use.

name: Choice Band
description: Holder's Attack is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.

name: Choice Specs
description: Holder's Sp. Atk is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.

name: Choice Scarf
description: Holder's Speed is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.

name: Assault Vest
description: Holder's Sp. Def is 1.5x, but it can only select damaging moves.

name: Leftovers
description: At the end of every turn, holder restores 1/16 of its max HP.

name: Black Sludge
description: Each turn, if holder is a Poison type, restores 1/16 max HP; loses 1/8 if not.

name: Rocky Helmet
description: If the holder is hit by a contact move, the attacker loses 1/6 of its max HP.

name: Safety Goggles
description: Holder is immune to powder moves and damage from Sandstorm or Hail.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
description: Holder is unaffected by hazards (Spikes, Stealth Rock, etc.).

name: Booster Energy
description: If holder has Protosynthesis or Quark Drive, its highest stat is boosted by 1.3x (1.5x for Speed).

name: Clear Amulet
description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering the holder's stat stages.

name: Covert Cloak
description: Holder is not affected by the secondary effects of another Pokemon's attack.

name: Eject Button
description: If holder survives a hit, it immediately switches out to a chosen ally. Single use.

name: Mental Herb
description: Cures holder of Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, Torment. Single use.

name: Sitrus Berry
description: Restores 1/4 max HP when at or below 1/2 max HP. Single use.

name: Lum Berry
description: Cures any status condition or confusion. Single use.

name: White Herb
description: Restores all lowered stat stages once. Single use.

name: Weakness Policy
description: If hit by a super effective move, Attack and Sp. Atk rise by 2 stages. Single use.
